templates.text: Keep going, wanderer - a {adjective} {place} waits just ahead.
You are braver than the {creature} that guards the {place}.
Rest a while, then rise and {action} toward the {direction}.
Every {adjective} step carries you closer to {emotion}.
Trust the path; it has led {adjective} travelers to the {place} before.
Let the {time} light remind you how far you have come.
Breathe in the {adjective} air and {action} on, friend.
Your {emotion} heart is always welcome in this {place}.
Tread softly - the {place} ahead grows {adjective} come {time}.
Mind the {direction} path; the {creature} there prefers a quiet passing.
The {adjective} mist gathers near the {place}. Wander with care.
Best not to {action} past this stone once the {time} settles in.
A {adjective} slope waits to the {direction}. Step gently, wanderer.
The {creature} sleeps nearby - pass it with a {emotion} hush.
Loose {thing} lies along the {direction} trail. Watch your footing.
Cool winds cross the {place} at {time}. Carry a {adjective} heart.
Follow the {direction} trail to find a {adjective} {place}.
A hidden {thing} rests beneath the {adjective} {creature}'s watch.
Look {direction} at {time} to see the {place} come alive.
Something {adjective} waits in the hush where the {creature} sings.
Beyond the {place} lies a {adjective} view worth the {action}.

Turn {direction} and a {adjective} {place} will quietly greet you.
Seek the {creature} to learn where the {thing} likes to hide.

Take this {emotion} moment as a small gift from a stranger.
A {adjective} song lingers to the {direction} - it is yours to keep.

May this {adjective} {place} give you the rest that I found here.
Here waits a {emotion} welcome, wanderer, however far you {action}.

Carry this {thing} onward and leave a {adjective} one behind.
Who left the {adjective} {thing} resting beside the {place}?
They say a {creature} walks the {direction} path at {time}.
No one quite knows why the {place} feels so {emotion}.
A {adjective} light flickers where no {creature} should be.
Something {adjective} hums beneath the {place}. Listen a while.
The {thing} appears only to those who {action} entirely alone.
At {time}, the {direction} wind carries a {adjective} whisper.
Follow the {creature} and you may never {action} quite the same.
